questions: Are there production gaps (security/integrity/quality/test/arch/packaging) in qor-logic at v0.107.2 that a full red-team would surface?
Does the META_LEDGER Merkle-seal Promise match Reality?

findings.detail: content_hash never re-derived from sealed artifacts at verify time (ledger_hash.py:480, seal_entry_check.py:107); only artifact-binding hasher calculate-session-seal.py:42 is dead placeholder code.
compliance enforce --engagement ci|seal passes vacuously (all runner:null -> zero runnable controls -> PASS); enforce.py:88.
gate-chain completeness is existence-only over self-reported session id (gate_chain_completeness.py:44,75).
no py.typed ships; compliance/*.json unguarded by packaging test (silent-removal breaks installed enforce).
FEATURE_INDEX FX017 cites wrong test file (test_skill_active_env.py vs test_cli_module_dispatch.py); FX013 line drift.
presence-only doctrine tests + conditional CI skips that no-op in degraded environments.
no remote exploit; session_id path-traversal validator applied inconsistently (orchestration_override.py:21, cycle_count_escalator.py:36).
